name: Multitales Online
short_description: Crazy competitive top-down shooter in the multiverse of fairy tales and legends.
detailed_description:
ABOUT THIS GAME

Even if the fairy tale has come to an end, it doesn’t mean its heroes have retired.

A mysterious sorcerer—unknown to any world until now—unleashes an ancient ritual, tearing apart the established order. The balance between universes is shattered, the boundaries of reality begin to blur, and looming over everything is the Fairypocalypse.

Once again, the familiar heroes must shoulder a heavy burden: to restore what has been broken and stop the destructive rewriting of fairy tales. But this time, it’s for real—there are weapons, hordes of enemies, and a battle that could be their last.

Dive into an alternate story of fairy tale legends—from Little Red Riding Hood to Alice in Wonderland and many others who are yet to take the stage.

Play through the story campaign or challenge your friends in arena battles. And remember: “happily ever after” is now just a memory.

FEATURES

  • A fresh reimagining of familiar fairy tale characters

  • A dark narrative hidden beneath a whimsical, lighthearted story

  • Cooperative Action — Defend either solo or with friends in lobbies of up to 4 players.

  • A unique cartoon art style crafted from scratch

  • A story-driven mode inspired by classic game mechanics
